description: Retrieves the full list of available tools that the AI agent can invoke.

intent.description: The user and agent intent used to discover and rank the most relevant tools for the current task.

agentIntent.description: The normalized intent produced by the agent for tool discovery, routing, or execution.

userIntent.description: The original intent as expressed by the user.

take.description: The maximum number of tools to return.

name: g4.FindTools

tools.description: An array of tool objects, each containing name, description, input and output schemas.

title: Find G4 Tools
